SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BEDELL, REGINALD H SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR HUDSON, MERRI

D. WICK, JUDGE; B. FIELDS, CSR; G. ESPINOCILLA, CLERK. 12:34 PM CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. ARNOLD W. EVJE II PRESENT FOR PLTF AND DEFT PRESENT WITH COUNSEL REGINALD H. BEDELL. AFTER EXTENSIVE DISCUSSIONS IN CHAMBERS, A NEGO- TIATED DISPOSITION IS REACHED AND READ INTO THE RECORD. PLTF COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUDSON, MERRI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 909 GEARY STREET, #304, SF, CA 94109, STAYED UNTIL FEB-08-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
